retrieved_result: Get DDL \"Oracle Get DDL2 0 0 Share\"\" Hi, Any one has some idea on generating a DDL of a table or for all the defined indexes on a table into a file using abinitio. I understand that this can be done in oracle using DBMS_METADATA. GET_DDL but looking for same kind of functionality in the abinitio world. Any
Decision_Reason: The result discusses generating DDL/metadata in Oracle/Ab Initio, not debugging API integrations; unrelated topic.
